title: Hody’s Shadow Grows
description: On pages 9–12, this part follows Unknown person #1, Narrator, Luffy, Vander Decken, Royal Guards, Fish-Men, Fish-Man Island Citizens. The core story beat is hody’s shadow grows.
scene: The scene centers on hody’s shadow grows, with Unknown person #1, Narrator, Luffy, Vander Decken, Royal Guards, Fish-Men, Fish-Man Island Citizens driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's not like you're leaving in a hurry!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can visit the Mermaid Cafe' some other time, when you've found your friends!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Right now, I was just about to take Boney over to see my place!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You guys come too! Whaddaya say to some sea-monster meat?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You have mere EEEAT?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What, you expect a man among men like me to live on seaweed and shellfish?! Only the most vicious of sea monsters is enough to safe my hunger!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, yes - papagg!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Here's your claim for today!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: MMMMM!! Caimie's delicious clam!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's a shell- fish!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: merfolk may not, but fishermen are fine with eating meat and fish!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So don't worry - you'll find plenty around here if you know where to look!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Whew... that's good to hear.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Tax!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hmmm?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What's this?!

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: Ahhhhh!!! It's Vander Becken!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Why is there a ghost on a wanted poster?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, right... the guy from the ghost ship we met on our way here?

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: Vander Beckent,

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: What's that?! You met Vander Becken?! The guy's a notorious undersea thief - the whole country's been searching for him for years!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: C'mon, get on board!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: Yeah, that decken... to begin with, he sent a love letter to the Princess of our kingdom every single week.

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: Eventually, he started scaling it up from letters to packages, and finally to marriage proposals - complete with blackmail...!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: Well, you can't really ignore that stuff, can you? The Princess was terrified.....

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: That's right! So the Princess' father, King Neptunee, got really angry, and sent the three princes we saw earlier out to search for him.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They've searched far and wide, with the help of the Royal Army, but they still haven't managed to find him!!

dialogue.speaker: Camie
dialogue.text: Uh, came? Camie? I was doing that explanation...

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: Oh, but you wouldn't know about the Royal Family. There's King Neptunee - the "Sea God" - who rules this country...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: And then he has four children. The youngest is the mermaid Princess. And her elder brothers are the three princes we saw earlier.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Fish taxi

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: What I'm more interested in hearing is whether this vander, decken really is a cursed pirate from hundreds of years ago!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Well, you know how legends are. Things get blown all out of proportion.

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: From what I hear, the original Mad Captain Vander Decken did exist, but he wound up here on Fish-Man Island...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and in the end, it was here that he died.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The ship that you guys saw most likely was the very same flying Dutchman from the legend...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but its captain is just a descendant of the original...

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: Vander Decken the ninth!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Caine... Caimie... Caimie...!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I see... well, that is a relief... I thought I might have run into a real- live ghost, you see - it scared the living daylights out of me!! Not that I'm alive, of course, but... still, it makes me feel better.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey, look over there!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's another old-lady mermaid!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Her tail's all split in half, just like with old lady Kokoro!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You'll end up with legs like that too when you hit thirty, right, came?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's right! I'm impressed you know!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And over there!! There's a baby!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Men
dialogue.text: There's a fishman dad, and his kids are a MER-BABY and a fish- boy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Man, this place is cool! All these different kinds of people...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: All different sizes and colours!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yeah, when two members of the different races get married and have kids, it's twice the fun!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You gotta guess whether it'll be a merkid or a fishkid, as well as whether it'll be a boy or a girl!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll be taking the fast lane from here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hm? What's that?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh... that's the sweet factory.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Nooo, no... I mean, why's there a pirate flag up there?

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: You'll see flags like that one at the entrance to the island, and in the port, as well. It's that flag that's protecting our island right now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The flag belongs to a pirate from the new world, name of Charlotte Rinrin!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Better known as big mam - one of the yonkou!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: before the war, we had whitebeard's name...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and that kept us safe from the hands of other pirates. These days, big mam does the same job.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In return, she expects a huge delivery of delicious sweets from us each month. That's what the factory's for.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Without a powerful name like that to protect us, our country would collapse. That's just how serious the pirate problem is around these parts.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Sweets?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Still, if she's protecting you just like whitebeard, this big mam must be a pretty all right sort of woman.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You could say that. Though of course, Whitebeard never asked for anything in return...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: To big mam, I suppose it's like a business of sorts...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Big mam, huh... a yonkou, just like shanks...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'd love to meet her someday...

summary: Hody’s Shadow Grows. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
